title: GLM-5.2 (Fully Tested): I got EARLY ACCESS & This MODEL is CRAZY!
summary: GLM-5.2 is an improved coding model from Z AI featuring a 1 million token context window and expected open-weight release under MIT license. It achieves performance around 81.43 on coding benchmarks, roughly 6 percent below Claude 3.5 Opus, and costs approximately 8 dollars per month through the GLM Coding Plan.
writeup: The video covers GLM-5.2, a new language model from Z AI, tested with early access. It documents the model's specifications: a 1 million token context window, an open-weight architecture, and plans for MIT licensing. On benchmarks it scores 81.43, roughly 6 percent below Opus 4.8, and it is available through the GLM Coding Plan subscription at around $8 per month.
